nodes.name: Focus Step
nodes.description: Stabilized stance. Slightly faster acceleration and cleaner turn recovery.

nodes.name: Dash
nodes.description: Short burst for repositioning and dodging gaps.

nodes.name: Phase Step
nodes.description: Safer traversal on uncertain terrain and narrow paths.

nodes.name: Aerial Shift
nodes.description: Improved mid-air correction during jump, glide, and landing windows.
